title: centaurea × sallentii
intro: Centaurea × sallentii, a hybrid of the Centaurea species, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and reducing pain. The health benefits of Centaurea × sallentii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Centaurea × sallentii can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
